title: RunnerRegistration
description: A registration record for a workflow runner process: its identity, liveness timestamps, capacity, supported transports, and the catalog versions it currently hosts.

runnerId.description: The stable identifier of the runner process.

environment.description: The single deployment environment this runner serves (design §5.5). Its sources, credentials, and network reach are this environment's; the runner is dispatchable only for runs targeting it, and inherits its reach (§14.2). A host serving several environments runs one runner process per environment.

reachTags.description: The runner's row-security reach (§14.2): the security tags (KVP labels) scoping who may SEE it. Stamped from the serving environment's managementTags at registration, so a tenant sees only the runners serving its environments. Absent on a runner serving an unscoped environment.

address.description: An optional address (for example a base URI) at which the runner can be reached.

startedAt.description: The instant at which the runner process started.

lastSeenAt.description: The instant of the runner's most recent heartbeat.

maxConcurrency.description: The maximum number of runs the runner will execute concurrently.

transports.description: The transport identifiers the runner supports.

hostedVersions.description: The catalog versions the runner currently hosts.

SecurityTagInfo.title: SecurityTagInfo
SecurityTagInfo.description: A security label (KVP) scoping the runner for row authorization (§14.2).

hash.description: The content hash of the hosted version's package.

loaded.description: Whether the runner has the version loaded and ready to execute.
